description.value: **Benefit:** When no ally is within 10 feet of you and you are not receiving benefits from the aid another action, you gain a +1 morale bonus on melee attack and damage rolls. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 2 stamina points to gain the benefits of Desperate Battler even while an ally is within 10 feet of you (but not when receiving the benefits of the aid another action).
